name: matchup_opponent_type combined with year_offset
description: Crosses the inline matchup branch (matchup_opponent_type) with year_offset behavior on a team-stats-from-plays column. Coverage gap (d).
expected_query: with "current_week_opponents" as (select "h" as "nfl_team", "v" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE' union select "v" as "nfl_team", "h" as "opponent" from "public"."nfl_games" where "year" = 2026 and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'PRE'), "t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8_team_stats" as materialized (select "t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8"."nfl_team", sum(t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8" group by "t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT SUM(t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8_team_stats.team_pass_yds_from_plays) FROM t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8_team_stats WHERE t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8_team_stats.nfl_team = current_week_opponents.opponent AND t2f7e86de589284abba5a667e5a26b4d8_team_stats.year BETWEEN null + -1 AND null + 0) AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "current_week_opponents" on "player"."current_nfl_team" = "current_week_opponents"."nfl_team" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
